    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    StatusList.addUser(User user, StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
    Adds or updates a user in the event's participant sub-collection.
    void
    StatusList.determineLocation(android.content.Context context, User user, StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
    Determines the user's current GPS location if the event requires it.
    void
    Lottery.onRunLottery(StatusList.ListUpdateListener finalListener)
    Executes the lottery selection process.
    void
    StatusList.removeUserFromDB(String deviceId, StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
    Removes a user from the event's participant sub-collection in Firestore.
    void
    Event.startListenAllLists(StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
    Start realtime listeners on all list classes.
    void
    StatusList.startListening(StatusList.ListUpdateListener listener)
    Attaches a SnapshotListener to Firestore to monitor participants with a specific status.
